titleStmt.title: SII 38.193: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 193. (A.R. No. 193 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: An unfinished historical introduction of the king Parakēśarivarman alias Rājarājadēva (II), beginning with his meykīrtti, Pūmaruviya poḻil-ēḻum. Other details are not available.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya poḻileḻum poruppeḻum puṉai nittilat tāma neṭuṅkuṭai poḻinta tavaḷa veṇṇilāk kuḷira potiyaccuṭarc cakkara veṟṟeneṉan Iccakkara veyilenappaRead veyileṟippa
ciṉappuliyuñ ceṅkolum paṇattuyikkuṅ kāval pūṇa paṇiyaṇai mikaiy parañcoti pāṟkaṭal niṉṟeḻuntaruḷi maṇi neṭumuṭi kavittaṉaneṉ maṇamaṭantaiyaik kaippiṭi
ttu malar muṟantai maṇiyāka varai māviṟ kuṭi vāḻpula maṭantai koḻiṉaṉākip pormaṭantaiyai maṇampuṇarntu tarukaḷiṉtuṟai vāḻtti parutimutaṟkulam viḷaṅka viḻunta vacaṉā mayantaiyum miḷaveṭuttātiyukaṅ ko
ḻuntu viṭṭut taḻaittoṅka koṭātaṟaṅ kuḷirtūṅka māri vāyttu vaḷañcurappa tāraṇi yor piṇiniṅka nallār taṅ kaṟpuyara nāṉmaṟaiyon toḻilvaḷara Ellārun taṉittaṉiye vāḻntaṉa yomeṉa makuḻ Oruvāruṭaṉ noru
varkkum moṉṟinuṭaṉ noṉṟukkum verupakaiyiṉattiṉṟi viḻaintu kātaluṭaṉ cera Intiraṉ mutal tacāpālar reṇmaru moruvaṭivāki vatanaRead vantapaṭiyeṉaniṉṟu maṟu
vāṇai kaṉiRead taṉinaṭāttina marayāṉaiyep paṇippuṇpaṉa vaṭi maṇiccilampeyyālaraṟṟuvaṉa celloṭaiye kalakkuṇpaṉa temāve vaṭuppaṭuvaṉa vāmalare kaṭiṉvarupuṉale ciṟai
ppaṭuvaṉa kāvukaḷe koṭiyavāvaṉa kaḷḷuṇpaṉa vaṇṭukaḷe poyyuṭaiyaṉa varaiveye pormalai vaṉa veḻukaḻaṉiye maiyyuṭaiyaṉa neṭuvaraiye maruḷuṭaiyaṉa
Iṉamāṉkaḷe kayaṟkulame piṟaḻtanu toḻuku varaittāyare kaṭittoṟuppār Iyaṟ pulavare poruḷ veypār Icaippāṇaretu kūṭañceyvāreṉṟu kūṟaivaṉ kākkuṅ tiru
nāṭṭiyal vituvena niṉṟu cāvalRead kāvalneṟipūṇṭu neṟiyallatu niṉayātu tantaiyillor tantaiyākiyun tāyārākiyu maintārillor maintaṉākiyum maṉṉuyirkaṭkuyirākiyu viḻi peṟṟappayane
m muttamiḻkku talaivaneṉavu munṟuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.193 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
